abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Mesmerizing
abilities.text: Enemy models may not declare triggers during duels with this model.

abilities.name: Terrifying Gaze
abilities.text: After a model within 6" declares an action outside its own activation, this model may drain a (soulstone) to have that action immediately fail.

actions.name: Gorgon's Kiss
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with this model, the target gains a Slow token. Then, move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Finisher
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage for each token on the target (to a maximum of +2).

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Whispers in the Dark
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. This action may target friendly models. Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Kiss of Death
triggers.text: After resolving the generated action, this model may declare a Gorgon's Kiss action targeting the same model, ignoring LoS and range.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

actions.name: The Healing Dark
actions.effects: Target heals an amount equal to the difference in the number of cards in its control hand and maximum hand size (to a maximum of 3).

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.
